description: A creative agency has delivered a ZIP file of 10 high-resolution stock photos for an upcoming summer campaign. Extract the archive located at /home/ga/Documents/summer_campaign_raw.zip and resize all 10 images to exactly 1080 pixels wide while maintaining their aspect ratio. Save the resized images to /home/ga/Documents/Processed_Campaign/. Log into Socioboard at http://localhost (Email: admin@socioboard.local, Password: Admin2024!) and upload the 10 resized images to the Socioboard Media/Image Library.
